permissions: Read the meeting notes you paste into the app
Use AI to turn them into action items
Save your action board so it persists across sessions
Post a summary back into the conversation when you ask
system_prompt_addendum: This conversation has the Action Board app. When the user shares meeting notes, a brain-dump, or asks to extract tasks/action items, open the 'board' view with open_app_view(view='board', payload={ notes: <the raw text> }). The app itself extracts structured action items (task, owner, deadline, priority) from the notes using the action-triage tool, shows them as editable cards the user can approve and drag, and persists them. Do not try to reformat the notes yourself first — pass the raw text through so the user keeps a clean human-in-the-loop review step inside the app.
